overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through an abandoned waterfront plaza in a cyberpunk city, transitioning from a derelict pool area with overgrown vegetation up to an elevated promenade revealing towering futuristic skyscrapers, and finally descending toward a beachfront boardwalk with a roller coaster structure visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned waterfront plaza with overgrown vegetation

events.description: exits covered wooden walkway into open sunlit plaza area
passes group of NPCs standing near the edge of empty pool

agents.ego_description: walking steadily out from under cover into the abandoned plaza, glancing toward NPCs near the pool

notable_agents.action: two individuals standing and conversing near the edge of an empty concrete pool

entered.detail: weathered wooden pavilion with open sides providing partial shade
tall palm trees with green fronds scattered throughout the plaza
large concrete depression filled with sand and debris, surrounded by overgrown grass
towering futuristic buildings with holographic advertisements and neon signs visible in the background
weathered wooden walkway with dry grass growing between the planks

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a wooden pavilion before emerging into a sunlit abandoned waterfront plaza. The camera moves past tall palm trees and weathered wooden decking toward a large empty concrete pool. Two NPCs stand conversing near the pool edge while futuristic skyscrapers loom in the distant haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned recreational area with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: begins ascending wide concrete staircase toward upper promenade level

agents.ego_description: walking across the concrete plaza toward a flight of stairs, then climbing upward while holding the railing

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal handrails leading up to the elevated walkway
concrete retaining wall covered in blue and white spray-painted graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: Moving through the abandoned plaza, the camera passes graffiti-covered walls and approaches a wide concrete staircase. The wooden structures and pool recede behind as the camera begins ascending the stairs, with the city skyline growing larger ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated promenade with panoramic city views

events.description: reaches top of stairs revealing full panoramic view of Night City skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated concrete promenade while admiring the towering skyscrapers and holographic displays

entered.detail: abandoned food stand with distinctive purple and yellow striped roof and faded neon signage
rusted metal safety railings along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: At the top of the stairs, the scene opens to a breathtaking panoramic view of the cyberpunk city skyline. The camera moves along the elevated promenade past rusted railings, with massive towers featuring holographic displays dominating the view. An abandoned food stand with a colorful purple roof appears on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront boardwalk with amusement park structures

events.description: passes the Brain Freeze building and descends toward beach level
ocean and beach become visible ahead beyond the boardwalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden boardwalk toward the beach, passing derelict structures and approaching the waterfront

notable_agents.action: armed figure standing on rooftop overlooking the path ahead

entered.detail: large metal roller coaster framework with tracks extending over the beach area
blue ocean water visible beyond the sandy beach
sandy beach area with scattered debris and abandoned items
derelict food carts with striped awnings along the boardwalk edge

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves past the abandoned Brain Freeze building and descends toward the beachfront. A large roller coaster structure dominates the left side, while the ocean becomes visible ahead. The camera passes an armed figure standing on a rooftop before approaching the sandy beach area with abandoned food carts lining the wooden boardwalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a derelict waterfront plaza up to a high-altitude city vista before descending toward a coastal boardwalk. It begins under a wooden pavilion and emerges into a sunlit plaza, gliding past palm trees and a large empty concrete pool where two figures converse beneath a distant, hazy skyline. As the camera moves past graffiti-covered walls, the plaza recedes and the view shifts upward while ascending a wide concrete staircase toward the looming city. The scene then opens onto an elevated promenade with rusted railings, revealing a panoramic view of massive towers and holographic displays before passing a purple-roofed food stand. Finally, the camera descends from the heights toward the beachfront, moving past a large roller coaster structure and an armed figure on a rooftop to reach a sandy shore lined with abandoned food carts.
